title: STP Petrol Injector Cleaner 200 ml, Mechanical Car Cleaning Products, Concentrated Cleaning Formula, Mechanical Car Cleaning Products, Made in the UK
features: What You'll Get - 200 ml Petrol Injector Cleaner, Concentrated Cleaning Power
Fast & Efficient- Unclogs injectors in just one tankful
Cleans and conditions the entire fuel delivery system while smoothing rough idiling
description: From the manufacturer Build up - Intake Valves Deposits on the intake valves can restrict or change the flow of air/fuel mixture into the combustion chamber When you shut off the engine, fuel that remains on the intake valves can polymerize into a hard carbon deposit or form a sticky gum Oil leaks past the valves seals and can contribute to deposits on the back of the intake valves Exhaust gas recirculation, which is a mechanism used in engines to reduce emissions, can cause soot and other combustion by-products to deposit onto the valves STP = Scientifically Treated Petroleum Fuel Additives For over 60 years, and for more miles than anyone can count, STP has been one of the most trusted names in automotive care. Car enthusiasts, “Do-it-Yourselfers” and professional racers rely on STP oil additives, fuel additives and brake and power steering fluids to keep their vehicles running better longer Due to 'Long Life' servicing intervals being stretched further, many vehicles face a build up of deposits that could have major implications on engine performance So why Use a Fuel additive? Additives are a relevant part of engine maintenance regime Car manufacturers recognise that “Clean engines = Better performance” Additives help keep vehicles running well, extends reliability, less likely to break down Build up of carbon deposits can occur within 4,000 miles, no matter how new or old the car is Build up - Injector Cleaners Clean fuel injectors are critical to vehicle performance Deposits can affect spray pattern and flow rate The spray pattern of fuel affects air/fuel mixing Fuel may be in droplets that don’t evaporate Fuel may stick to the intake port and not be drawn into the combustion chamber Clogging affects amount of fuel delivered, which results in inaccurate air/fuel blend Ultra 5 in 1 Complete Fuel System Cleaner High Mileage Injector Cleaner Start Stop Engine Cleaner Injector Cleaner Petrol Treatment Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 4,390 4.6 out of 5 stars 4,390 — 4.6 out of 5 stars 95 4.6 out of 5 stars 4,390 4.6 out of 5 stars 4,390 Preventative Keep Clean ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Injector Clean Up ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ no data Fuel System Clean Up ✓ ✓ no data no data no data no data Power Booster ✓ no data no data no data no data no data STP Wearguard/Anti-wear ✓ no data ✓ ✓ no data no data Ultra 5 in 1 Complete Fuel System Cleaner High Mileage Injector Cleaner Start Stop Engine Cleaner Injector Cleaner Diesel Treatment Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 9,614 4.5 out of 5 stars 145 4.5 out of 5 stars 9,614 4.5 out of 5 stars 110 4.5 out of 5 stars 9,614 4.5 out of 5 stars 9,614 Preventative Keep Clean ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Injector Clean Up ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ no data Fuel System Clean Up ✓ ✓ no data no data no data no data Cetane Improver ✓ no data no data no data no data no data STP Wearguard/Anti-wear ✓ no data ✓ ✓ no data no data
